name: mBER
description: Design VHH binders against target proteins using structure templates and sequence conditioning. Leverages AlphaFold-Multimer for protein folding predictions during optimization. Support for custom epitope/hotspot selection to target specific binding sites. Automatic hotspot detection when hotspot residues not specified. Achieved specific and significant design success against 45% of 145 targets. In a filtered set of designs, detected binding rates to specific epitopes as high as 38%.
capabilities: Design VHH binders against target proteins using structure templates and sequence conditioning
Leverages AlphaFold-Multimer for protein folding predictions during optimization
Support for custom epitope/hotspot selection to target specific binding sites
Automatic hotspot detection when hotspot residues not specified
Achieved specific and significant design success against 45% of 145 targets. In a filtered set of designs, detected binding rates to specific epitopes as high as 38%

pdbFile.description: Target protein structure in PDB format

targetChains.description: Chain IDs of the target protein

hotspotResidues.description: Specific epitope residues to target. If empty, mBER auto-detects binding sites.

vhhTemplate.description: VHH framework sequence where asterisks (*) denote CDR regions for optimization
